mechanism: The credit cycle turning point determines whether a carry unwind remains contained (positioning adjustment, recovery within weeks) or becomes systemic (cross-asset contagion, self-reinforcing). Perfect classification across all examined episodes: contained when no credit turn, systemic when credit cycle turns.
regime_dependence: Always operative. IG spreads below ~130bp and HY below ~450bp favor contained outcomes. Late-cycle conditions (maturity wall, covenant-lite structures) elevate systemic probability.
